---
title: "Predicting Skin Cancer Status"
description: "A machine learning and predictive classification project analyzing 50 variables to identify benign vs. malignant tumor status."
image: "health.jpg"
---

### Project Deliverables

::: {layout-ncol=2}

::: {.card .text-center .p-3}
[![](slide_icon.png)](101C Project Presentation.pdf)

[**Presentation Slides (PDF)**](101C Project Presentation.pdf)
:::

:::
